name: metal room
hints: An alien metal room with a force field blocking passage and a control console!
The control console operates the force field. You need to figure out how to deactivate it.
Interact with the control console to disable the force field. This is a critical endgame puzzle.
E=metal tunnel (22). USE CONS or PUSH CONS to operate console. Force field blocks access to rooms beyond.
notes: Alien room with force field and control console. E=metal tunnel (22). Console controls force field. Critical endgame location.
